decoded.explanation: The defendant committed a serious breach of trust by embezzling twenty-five thousand dollars from their employer. Considering the defendant has no prior criminal record and has already made partial restitution showing remorse and a willingness to make amends a more lenient sentence focused on restitution is appropriate. A short period of incarceration is ordered to serve as a deterrent.
